name: Fried Wontons with Orange Dipping Sauce
recipeInstructions:
WONTONS: In a medium bowl, combine the pork, shrimp, scallions, cabbage, soy sauce, cornstarch, and ginger. Mix well.
Spoon an equal amount of pork mixture (about 1 teaspoon) onto the center of each wonton wrapper.
Moisten the edges of the wrappers with water and fold them in half, triangle fashion, enclosing the filling and forming 20 wontons.
Press the edges together to seal. Bring the base corners of each triangle together, overlapping the corners, and press to seal.
In a 12-inch nonstick skillet or wok, heat oil and margarine over high heat until the margarine is bubbly.
Add the wontons and cook, turning frequently, until browned on all sides. Add teriyaki sauce and bring to a boil, stirring to coat the wontons.
Use a slotted spoon to remove the wontons to a serving plate, reserving the pan drippings. Set the wontons aside and keep warm.
DIPPING SAUCE: To the same skillet or wok, add the ingredients for the dipping sauce and stir to combine with the pan drippings. Pour the sauce into small bowls and serve with the wontons. Makes 4 servings of 5 wontons each.
